Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}To be honest, man, me too. I can't seem to get into a groove...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I thought I could if I came here, but I guess not...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Yeah... You've gotta be groovy to come to a place like this, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I ain't that groovy... Maybe it's because I don't usually come here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}It's almost summer... I'm bummed out 'cause I can't get into the groove...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I can't seem to get into the groove either. It's heinous, man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Maybe I've got that Apathy Syndrome thing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I can't... get the... groove... groove... groove...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I couldn't think at all for a while. I had no idea what I was doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Then, all of a sudden, at the beginning of the month, I was totally healed. No idea how.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}But I still can't get into the groove here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}It's autumn already... I'd better get my groove on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Winter's coming up. It's a tough season for people who can't get into the groove...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I can't get my groove on, so it's a bummer of a time for me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I'm so jealous of you, man... I bet you've got a girlfriend.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}You'll do fine over Christmas if you've got somebody.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I see... I can't catch a groove either.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I guess it'll be a lonely Christmas for us two dudes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Just like every year...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Everybody's in the Christmas spirit, but I'm not feeling it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}But what can you do? I'm just gonna keep dancing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Christmas was great![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I bought a leftover cake on the 25th and I just stuffed myself at home in the dark.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I didn't even use any utensils![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Some Christmas, huh? Hahahaha! Haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}I see... But that's just temporary, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}It can't match the Salvation that Nyx is going to bring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Don't worry, your sadness is only temporary.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 407}Nyx's Salvation will save us all.[n]{f 1 1}
